Subject: Farewell and Thank You

Dear Team,

After much reflection, I've decided to move on to a new chapter in my career, and today is my last day with the company. I want to sincerely thank each of you for the support, collaboration, and countless memories we've shared during my time here. Working alongside such a talented and kind group of people has been one of the highlights of my professional journey. Please feel free to stay in touch with me at [your email] or connect with me on LinkedIn—I'd love to keep up with your continued successes. Wishing you all the very best in everything ahead!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
